sections.paragraph:
- Original: θιγγάνω

- Transliteration: Thiggano

- Phonetic: thing-gan'-o

- Definition:

1. to touch, handle

a. to do violence to, injury

- Origin: a prolonged form of an obsolete primary thigo (to finger)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: A prolonged form of an obsolete primary word θίγω thigō (to finger); to manipulate that is have to do with; by implication to injure: - handle touch.
